Hashes the key to a predicate         id and reads from the attribute store; returns \"\" if the         predicate is not registered (mirrors ENS no-record-set)."}},"notice":"Per-node resolver for the .agent namespace. Phase 0.2: typed text         records route through OntologyAttributeStore; ENSIP-9 multi-coin         address records stay on-contract because they don't fit the         attribute-store model cleanly. Subject id for a name node is the node itself (already a bytes32 namehash). The resolver is registered as a trustedWriter on AttributeAuth so authorized writes pass through to the store. Compatibility: the legacy text(node, key) ABI is preserved. The key is hashed to a predicate id; unregistered keys soft-fail to \"\" (mirrors ENS \"no record set\" semantics).","version":1}},"settings":{"compilationTarget":{"src/AgentNameAttributeResolver.sol":"AgentNameAttributeResolver"},"evmVersion":"prague","libraries":{},"metadata":{"bytecodeHash":"ipfs"},"optimizer":{"enabled":true,"runs":200},"remappings":[":@openzeppelin/contracts/=lib/openzeppelin-contracts/contracts/",":account-abstraction/=lib/account-abstraction/contracts/",":erc4626-tests/=lib/openzeppelin-contracts/lib/erc4626-tests/",":forge-std/=lib/forge-std/src/",":halmos-cheatcodes/=lib/openzeppelin-contracts/lib/halmos-cheatcodes/src/",":openzeppelin-contracts/=lib/openzeppelin-contracts/"],"viaIR":true},"sources":{"src/AgentNameAttributeResolver.sol":{"keccak256":"0xc8afb2b71772a57fcc5042005419ce5c7ad1d70ebc667d508b7eb39ae2787e85","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://0b5e041d9cac03decebded63f0f15387fc78aa7d9a4bf8ce2787ab36c7495830","dweb:/ipfs/QmQGFepnnLTYb88zSffVFe3CAy4CMQFt5DP6M1CWUBs5rP"]},"src/AgentNameRegistry.sol":{"keccak256":"0x320b75377fd5aebbf36f0e3ab6ff01036ce0f548936d69fd6253f0ec0cddaafc","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://fbfaecd9dd57883a9dfe76dd8ef1d1f9d1784ea2b553b1b9812fcee6aa77d2bd","dweb:/ipfs/QmTmwCMGr6b4UMeT7ZHDuwx7PRqR3jxmANghUAiCYQpYJ5"]},"src/AgentRelationship.sol":{"keccak256":"0x79063025928424d79229b22cb8c68783ac9ff3527cb5f2b2a92cf44aaf56a3bf","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://448c147db1a31c6526a37a05fe4be4dbd161984b2832e5ee552dc876c48c1762","dweb:/ipfs/QmYBgjKDKHRXrdLkvK7FZwisnfed4qnf764Atb3YXtmuW3"]},"src/IAttributeAuth.sol":{"keccak256":"0x0fb87feb9ef894a2a3e32dae22738cc19bdae5c19f8bc983595647a686e88d5b","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://9b7da471e4ff5771120e02e95c1da843f2745006e7fe65ee74aeb05aa7b51771","dweb:/ipfs/QmToyQ8YTKkqYfX6WjbVQ6631S6k6sLhp2rNYfEeJjxe1t"]},"src/OntologyAttributeStore.sol":{"keccak256":"0xd4cc10af408383c7c1ab8d610152bc510f8aecb6c72201f106509869f24ea44b","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://b8b484f27d3b771674292be66471948c6a56da8808af918abf0d39fbd3b07ee8","dweb:/ipfs/QmSyeXCzArpgeQZLrCD5MdrZy6KTrxAPNrZzudCYPx text(bytes32,string).notice: ENS-style text record lookup. Hashes the key to a predicate         id and reads from the attribute store; returns "" if the         predicate is not registered (mirrors ENS no-record-set).
